# ensenzu

> Tool for rendering induction-motor circle diagrams and calculating operating characteristics.

- App : https://ensenzu.shiguri.workers.dev/ (GUI, client-side rendered)
- Agents should use the API instead of the CSR UI.
- API: POST https://ensenzu.shiguri.workers.dev/api/diagram returns SVG and characteristics.
- OpenAPI: https://ensenzu.shiguri.workers.dev/openapi.json
